name: G11_HYPEROBJECT
desc: The Hyperobject project in Hudson Yards is a geological, hybrid institution that redefines media as an inhabited environment. Acting as a rupture in the corporate landscape, the building mediates the relationship between ecology and the digital realm. It treats nature as a blend of data and simulation, establishing a distinct civic identity on Manhattan’s edge. The design is simultaneously terrestrial and technologically alien, reflecting our modern, mediated understanding of the planet.

name: G15_MEDIA_TOWER
desc: The project organizes its programmatic core into a centralized vertical column which houses the archived data. This structural spine is supported and stabilized by fluid ribbon facades, which wrap the volume to create a dichotomy  between the rigid core and the flowing exterior structure. These ribbons also function as a display for the media housed inside of the archive, actively projecting and displaying the digital media.
